TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == binaduan a gangŚ≠źŚģģŤāĆÁė§ == binaduan a ganga u sakayda i binaduan a masalupenucay i udip a gang. anu ina gang itida i labu nu binaduan u ci-pi-cen-ci-liw, pasayda i binaduan a idaw u neng-muo-sia-ci-liw, pasayda i ce-kun-cen-muo hekal a idaw u cen-muo-sia-ci-liw. hatidaay tu nu nikasiimelangan tu nu tatayna a imelangan nai' ku adaadadaaca, pinaay kiya ku adadaay nu bilian atu tadayadah ku nika tahekalan. anu ce-kun-ci-liw micalap tu taisian, sa hinaisi, duma hantu yu malaledi' adada atu sasanu kulul adadatu, ninaimelang hakiya cacay atu micalap tu yadahay a imelangan. alahican u ce-kun-ci-liw caay ka siwawaw, mahiniay caay ka hinaadih kita. . adada a mabuladÁ∂ďÁóõ adada a mabulad, nika adada nu bulad atu nikapisacepicepit a mabulad, u tatayna anu mabulad tu nika tayni nu adadaan. yu a mabulad kya adada, nika hninian a dada caay pakaala tu tuluay a demiad. nikaadadaan nu bulad itidaaaca i tatelecan atu bili', duma a adadaan pasu kulul, mabanic, kalautauta'an. Á∂ďÁóõ, . tada yadah tu ku idangÁ∂ďŤ°ÄťĀéŚ§ö tada yadah tu ku idang sakamusa u tatayna kabuladan tada yadah tu ku nikatahekalan nu idang sa, u la'cusay nu nikatahekalan nu idang sa. caay kaw tatengaay a nika idangan, hakiya namaka sen-ce-ci-kuo malalawlaw, nai' ku tikuk, kaidangan a imelang, ci-su- caay ka kapah, atu cacumudan a gang. 50 hicaen payu, pihaceng. paytem a misuayaw tu nikaudip. mahkapayu awu sapiput tu wawa a sapayuan, anu caay tu ka ngaay, kiya sizicuan sa. nu cacay a malebutan nu tataynaan idaw ku lima a bataan idaw ku tulu a tataynaan idaw ku mahiniay a imelangan. . caay henay ka tinengi ku mahiniay a imelangan. anu idaw ku lumaay a tademaw nu mahiniaay a imelangan, macunus ku nika talakawan a idaw, u dumasatu hakiya u caayay ka taneng ku hulumung. Katalawan nu ce-kun-ci-liw han pasu kidemutu atu tada yadah ku nika tu sumanahay a hecian. mikinsa satu sipakayda i tatelecan atu dingki sasingan a mikinsa. . anu nai' tu ku adaadada' aca sasahican a payuan sa. anu utiih satu, taneng u pu-luo-hu atu yi-i'-an-hun ku payuan, anu tada yadah tu kunikatahekalan nu idang amukan tu tei-ce sa. sin-sen-ci-su patahekal tu sapingaay nu sapayuan taneng miadidi tu gang, nika matekes idaw ku nipatahekal tu duma a adadaan. anu idaw satu ku adada, kanca sizicuan miala tu laliwawaan kya idaw ku nikangaayan sa, anu hidan nu naayaway ku nipipelaan tu bili atu pacumuden tu sasasingan misizicu, taneng hiyan tu ce-kun-tun-may-sun-say-su', makayda i banges lawpesen mipaakuti' a nipayuan, atu pihacengay nu cui-ciaw a sizicuan a payu, mingaay, in ace-kun-pin-hua-ci-zuo-liw u ce-kun-ci-liw a gangan, caay kita ka hnaadih, caay ka hida u kapahay a nikaadadaan a nikasumadan nu ce-kun-ci-liwan sa. . hatida 20% katukuh 80% a tataynaan itini i nu ayawan nu limaay a bataan nu mihcaan a tataynaan idaw ku ce-kun-ci-liw sa. itini i tusep caylu mihcaan nisausian idaw ku 1.71 ubadan a tataynaan idaw namin ku ce-kun-ci-liw. Hatidaay itida aca pilecuhan nu wawa a mihcaan atu dikudikutu a tahekal, anu nai' satu ku bulad adidi' satu. itini i Amilika, hina ala ku nuheni tu laliwawaan sa. ÁīĄ20%Ťá≥80 .
S.PHON: == binaduan a gaŇč**** == binaduan a gaŇča u sakajda i binaduan a masar~…ĺup…ônu ¶aj i udip a gaŇč. anu ina gaŇč itida i r~…ĺabu nu binaduan u ¶i-pi- ¶…ôn- ¶i-r~…ĺiw, pasajda i binaduan a idaw u n…ôŇč-muo-sia- ¶i-r~…ĺiw, pasajda i ¶…ô-kun- ¶…ôn-muo ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a idaw u ¶…ôn-muo-sia- ¶i-r~…ĺiw. ńßatidaaj tu nu nikasiim…ôr~…ĺaŇčan tu nu tatajna a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan nai Ē~ ° ku adaadadaa ¶a, pinaaj kija ku adadaaj nu bir~…ĺian atu tadajadańß ku nika tańß…ôkar~…ĺan. anu ¶…ô-kun- ¶i-r~…ĺiw mi ¶ar~…ĺap tu taisian, sa ńßinaisi, duma ńßantu ju mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdi Ē~ ° adada atu sasanu kur~…ĺur~…ĺ adadatu, ninaim…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßakija ¶a ¶aj atu mi ¶ar~…ĺap tu jadańßaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. ar~…ĺańßi ¶an u ¶…ô-kun- ¶i-r~…ĺiw ¶aaj ka siwawaw, mańßiniaj ¶aaj ka ńßinaadińß kita. . adada a mabur~…ĺad** adada a mabur~…ĺad, nika adada nu bur~…ĺad atu nikapisa ¶…ôpi ¶…ôpit a mabur~…ĺad, u tatajna anu mabur~…ĺad tu nika tajni nu adadaan. ju a mabur~…ĺad kja adada, nika ńßninian a dada ¶aaj pakaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺuaj a d…ômiad. nikaadadaan nu bur~…ĺad itidaaa ¶a i tat…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶an atu bir~…ĺi Ē~ °, duma a adadaan pasu kur~…ĺur~…ĺ, mabani ¶, kar~…ĺautauta Ē~ °an. **, . tada jadańß tu ku idaŇč**** tada jadańß tu ku idaŇč sakamusa u tatajna kabur~…ĺadan tada jadańß tu ku nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu idaŇč sa, u r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nu nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu idaŇč sa. ¶aaj kaw tat…ôŇčaaj a nika idaŇčan, ńßakija namaka s…ôn- ¶…ô- ¶i-kuo mar~…ĺar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw, nai Ē~ ° ku tikuk, kaidaŇčan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ¶i-su- ¶aaj ka kapańß, atu ¶a ¶umudan a gaŇč. ** ńßi ¶a…ôn paju, pińßa ¶…ôŇč. pajt…ôm a misuajaw tu nikaudip. mańßkapaju awu sapiput tu wawa a sapajuan, anu ¶aaj tu ka Ňčaaj, kija sizi ¶uan sa. nu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbutan nu tatajnaan idaw ku r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a tatajnaan idaw ku mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. . ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka tin…ôŇči ku mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. anu idaw ku r~…ĺumaaj a tad…ômaw nu mańßiniaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, ma ¶unus ku nika tar~…ĺakawan a idaw, u dumasatu ńßakija u ¶aajaj ka tan…ôŇč ku ńßur~…ĺumuŇč. katar~…ĺawan nu ¶…ô-kun- ¶i-r~…ĺiw ńßan pasu kid…ômutu atu tada jadańß ku nika tu sumanańßaj a ńß…ô ¶ian. mikinsa satu sipakajda i tat…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶an atu diŇčki sasiŇčan a mikinsa. . anu nai Ē~ ° tu ku adaadada Ē~ ° a ¶a sasańßi ¶an a pajuan sa. anu utiińß satu, tan…ôŇč u pu-r~…ĺuo-ńßu atu ji-i Ē~ °-an-ńßun ku pajuan, anu tada jadańß tu kunikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu idaŇč amukan tu t…ôi- ¶…ô sa. sin-s…ôn- ¶i-su patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sapiŇčaaj nu sapajuan tan…ôŇč miadidi tu gaŇč, nika mat…ôk…ôs idaw ku nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu duma a adadaan. anu idaw satu ku adada, kan ¶a sizi ¶uan miar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwawaan kja idaw ku nikaŇčaajan sa, anu ńßidan nu naajawaj ku nipip…ôr~…ĺaan tu bir~…ĺi atu pa ¶umud…ôn tu sasasiŇčan misizi ¶u, tan…ôŇč ńßijan tu ¶…ô-kun-tun-maj-sun-saj-su Ē~ °, makajda i baŇč…ôs r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn mipaakuti Ē~ ° a nipajuan, atu pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu ¶ui- ¶iaw a sizi ¶uan a paju, miŇčaaj, in a ¶…ô-kun-pin-ńßua- ¶i-zuo-r~…ĺiw u ¶…ô-kun- ¶i-r~…ĺiw a gaŇčan, ¶aaj kita ka ńßnaadińß, ¶aaj ka ńßida u kapańßaj a nikaadadaan a nikasumadan nu ¶…ô-kun- ¶i-r~…ĺiwan sa. . ńßatida **% katukuńß **% a tatajnaan itini i nu ajawan nu r~…ĺimaaj a bataan nu mińß ¶aan a tatajnaan idaw ku ¶…ô-kun- ¶i-r~…ĺiw sa. itini i tus…ôp ¶ajr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan nisausian idaw ku *.** ubadan a tatajnaan idaw namin ku ¶…ô-kun- ¶i-r~…ĺiw. ńßatidaaj itida a ¶a pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nu wawa a mińß ¶aan atu dikudikutu a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, anu nai Ē~ ° satu ku bur~…ĺad adidi Ē~ ° satu. itini i amir~…ĺika, ńßina ar~…ĺa ku nuńß…ôni tu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwawaan sa. ***%*** .
S.FORM: == binaduan a gangŚ≠źŚģģŤāĆÁė§ == binaduan a ganga u sakayda i binaduan a masalupenucay i udip a gang. anu ina gang itida i labu nu binaduan u ci-pi-cen-ci-liw, pasayda i binaduan a idaw u neng-muo-sia-ci-liw, pasayda i ce-kun-cen-muo hekal a idaw u cen-muo-sia-ci-liw. hatidaay tu nu nikasiimelangan tu nu tatayna a imelangan nai' ku adaadadaaca, pinaay kiya ku adadaay nu bilian atu tadayadah ku nika tahekalan. anu ce-kun-ci-liw micalap tu taisian, sa hinaisi, duma hantu yu malaledi' adada atu sasanu kulul adadatu, ninaimelang hakiya cacay atu micalap tu yadahay a imelangan. alahican u ce-kun-ci-liw caay ka siwawaw, mahiniay caay ka hinaadih kita. . adada a mabuladÁ∂ďÁóõ adada a mabulad, nika adada nu bulad atu nikapisacepicepit a mabulad, u tatayna anu mabulad tu nika tayni nu adadaan. yu a mabulad kya adada, nika hninian a dada caay pakaala tu tuluay a demiad. nikaadadaan nu bulad itidaaaca i tatelecan atu bili', duma a adadaan pasu kulul, mabanic, kalautauta'an. Á∂ďÁóõ, . tada yadah tu ku idangÁ∂ďŤ°ÄťĀéŚ§ö tada yadah tu ku idang sakamusa u tatayna kabuladan tada yadah tu ku nikatahekalan nu idang sa, u la'cusay nu nikatahekalan nu idang sa. caay kaw tatengaay a nika idangan, hakiya namaka sen-ce-ci-kuo malalawlaw, nai' ku tikuk, kaidangan a imelang, ci-su- caay ka kapah, atu cacumudan a gang. 50 hicaen payu, pihaceng. paytem a misuayaw tu nikaudip. mahkapayu awu sapiput tu wawa a sapayuan, anu caay tu ka ngaay, kiya sizicuan sa. nu cacay a malebutan nu tataynaan idaw ku lima a bataan idaw ku tulu a tataynaan idaw ku mahiniay a imelangan. . caay henay ka tinengi ku mahiniay a imelangan. anu idaw ku lumaay a tademaw nu mahiniaay a imelangan, macunus ku nika talakawan a idaw, u dumasatu hakiya u caayay ka taneng ku hulumung. Katalawan nu ce-kun-ci-liw han pasu kidemutu atu tada yadah ku nika tu sumanahay a hecian. mikinsa satu sipakayda i tatelecan atu dingki sasingan a mikinsa. . anu nai' tu ku adaadada' aca sasahican a payuan sa. anu utiih satu, taneng u pu-luo-hu atu yi-i'-an-hun ku payuan, anu tada yadah tu kunikatahekalan nu idang amukan tu tei-ce sa. sin-sen-ci-su patahekal tu sapingaay nu sapayuan taneng miadidi tu gang, nika matekes idaw ku nipatahekal tu duma a adadaan. anu idaw satu ku adada, kanca sizicuan miala tu laliwawaan kya idaw ku nikangaayan sa, anu hidan nu naayaway ku nipipelaan tu bili atu pacumuden tu sasasingan misizicu, taneng hiyan tu ce-kun-tun-may-sun-say-su', makayda i banges lawpesen mipaakuti' a nipayuan, atu pihacengay nu cui-ciaw a sizicuan a payu, mingaay, in ace-kun-pin-hua-ci-zuo-liw u ce-kun-ci-liw a gangan, caay kita ka hnaadih, caay ka hida u kapahay a nikaadadaan a nikasumadan nu ce-kun-ci-liwan sa. . hatida 20% katukuh 80% a tataynaan itini i nu ayawan nu limaay a bataan nu mihcaan a tataynaan idaw ku ce-kun-ci-liw sa. itini i tusep caylu mihcaan nisausian idaw ku 1.71 ubadan a tataynaan idaw namin ku ce-kun-ci-liw. Hatidaay itida aca pilecuhan nu wawa a mihcaan atu dikudikutu a tahekal, anu nai' satu ku bulad adidi' satu. itini i Amilika, hina ala ku nuheni tu laliwawaan sa. ÁīĄ20%Ťá≥80 .
S.PHON: == binaduan a gaŇč**** == binaduan a gaŇča u sakajda i binaduan a masar~…ĺup…ônu ¶aj i udip a gaŇč. anu ina gaŇč itida i r~…ĺabu nu binaduan u ¶i-pi- ¶…ôn- ¶i-r~…ĺiw, pasajda i binaduan a idaw u n…ôŇč-muo-sia- ¶i-r~…ĺiw, pasajda i ¶…ô-kun- ¶…ôn-muo ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a idaw u ¶…ôn-muo-sia- ¶i-r~…ĺiw. ńßatidaaj tu nu nikasiim…ôr~…ĺaŇčan tu nu tatajna a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan nai Ē~ ° ku adaadadaa ¶a, pinaaj kija ku adadaaj nu bir~…ĺian atu tadajadańß ku nika tańß…ôkar~…ĺan. anu ¶…ô-kun- ¶i-r~…ĺiw mi ¶ar~…ĺap tu taisian, sa ńßinaisi, duma ńßantu ju mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdi Ē~ ° adada atu sasanu kur~…ĺur~…ĺ adadatu, ninaim…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßakija ¶a ¶aj atu mi ¶ar~…ĺap tu jadańßaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. ar~…ĺańßi ¶an u ¶…ô-kun- ¶i-r~…ĺiw ¶aaj ka siwawaw, mańßiniaj ¶aaj ka ńßinaadińß kita. . adada a mabur~…ĺad** adada a mabur~…ĺad, nika adada nu bur~…ĺad atu nikapisa ¶…ôpi ¶…ôpit a mabur~…ĺad, u tatajna anu mabur~…ĺad tu nika tajni nu adadaan. ju a mabur~…ĺad kja adada, nika ńßninian a dada ¶aaj pakaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺuaj a d…ômiad. nikaadadaan nu bur~…ĺad itidaaa ¶a i tat…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶an atu bir~…ĺi Ē~ °, duma a adadaan pasu kur~…ĺur~…ĺ, mabani ¶, kar~…ĺautauta Ē~ °an. **, . tada jadańß tu ku idaŇč**** tada jadańß tu ku idaŇč sakamusa u tatajna kabur~…ĺadan tada jadańß tu ku nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu idaŇč sa, u r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nu nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu idaŇč sa. ¶aaj kaw tat…ôŇčaaj a nika idaŇčan, ńßakija namaka s…ôn- ¶…ô- ¶i-kuo mar~…ĺar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw, nai Ē~ ° ku tikuk, kaidaŇčan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ¶i-su- ¶aaj ka kapańß, atu ¶a ¶umudan a gaŇč. ** ńßi ¶a…ôn paju, pińßa ¶…ôŇč. pajt…ôm a misuajaw tu nikaudip. mańßkapaju awu sapiput tu wawa a sapajuan, anu ¶aaj tu ka Ňčaaj, kija sizi ¶uan sa. nu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbutan nu tatajnaan idaw ku r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a tatajnaan idaw ku mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. . ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka tin…ôŇči ku mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. anu idaw ku r~…ĺumaaj a tad…ômaw nu mańßiniaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, ma ¶unus ku nika tar~…ĺakawan a idaw, u dumasatu ńßakija u ¶aajaj ka tan…ôŇč ku ńßur~…ĺumuŇč. katar~…ĺawan nu ¶…ô-kun- ¶i-r~…ĺiw ńßan pasu kid…ômutu atu tada jadańß ku nika tu sumanańßaj a ńß…ô ¶ian. mikinsa satu sipakajda i tat…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶an atu diŇčki sasiŇčan a mikinsa. . anu nai Ē~ ° tu ku adaadada Ē~ ° a ¶a sasańßi ¶an a pajuan sa. anu utiińß satu, tan…ôŇč u pu-r~…ĺuo-ńßu atu ji-i Ē~ °-an-ńßun ku pajuan, anu tada jadańß tu kunikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu idaŇč amukan tu t…ôi- ¶…ô sa. sin-s…ôn- ¶i-su patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sapiŇčaaj nu sapajuan tan…ôŇč miadidi tu gaŇč, nika mat…ôk…ôs idaw ku nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu duma a adadaan. anu idaw satu ku adada, kan ¶a sizi ¶uan miar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwawaan kja idaw ku nikaŇčaajan sa, anu ńßidan nu naajawaj ku nipip…ôr~…ĺaan tu bir~…ĺi atu pa ¶umud…ôn tu sasasiŇčan misizi ¶u, tan…ôŇč ńßijan tu ¶…ô-kun-tun-maj-sun-saj-su Ē~ °, makajda i baŇč…ôs r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn mipaakuti Ē~ ° a nipajuan, atu pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu ¶ui- ¶iaw a sizi ¶uan a paju, miŇčaaj, in a ¶…ô-kun-pin-ńßua- ¶i-zuo-r~…ĺiw u ¶…ô-kun- ¶i-r~…ĺiw a gaŇčan, ¶aaj kita ka ńßnaadińß, ¶aaj ka ńßida u kapańßaj a nikaadadaan a nikasumadan nu ¶…ô-kun- ¶i-r~…ĺiwan sa. . ńßatida **% katukuńß **% a tatajnaan itini i nu ajawan nu r~…ĺimaaj a bataan nu mińß ¶aan a tatajnaan idaw ku ¶…ô-kun- ¶i-r~…ĺiw sa. itini i tus…ôp ¶ajr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan nisausian idaw ku *.** ubadan a tatajnaan idaw namin ku ¶…ô-kun- ¶i-r~…ĺiw. ńßatidaaj itida a ¶a pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nu wawa a mińß ¶aan atu dikudikutu a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, anu nai Ē~ ° satu ku bur~…ĺad adidi Ē~ ° satu. itini i amir~…ĺika, ńßina ar~…ĺa ku nuńß…ôni tu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwawaan sa. ***%*** .
